anime_pulse_items.title: Sakura Revolution: Final Season Premieres with Record Viewership
anime_pulse_items.summary: The highly anticipated final season of Sakura Revolution debuted with unprecedented streaming numbers across platforms, sparking intense fan discussions about the series' conclusion.

anime_pulse_items.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Season 2 Announced for Fall 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio Trigger officially announces second season of the acclaimed Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, set to continue the story with new characters and expanded Night City lore.

anime_pulse_items.title: Manga Adaptation 'Starlight Wanderer' Tops Spring 2026 Sales Charts
anime_pulse_items.summary: New manga series Starlight Wanderer dominates physical and digital sales in its debut month, praised for its unique art style and isekai narrative twist.

anime_pulse_items.title: Virtual YouTuber Collaboration Event Features Anime Crossovers
anime_pulse_items.summary: Major VTuber agencies host Spring 2026 collaboration featuring cameos from popular Spring anime characters, driving massive live stream engagement.

anime_pulse_items.title: Studio Ghibli Announces New Film for 2027 Release
anime_pulse_items.summary: Hayao Miyazaki reveals details about upcoming Studio Ghibli project, described as a fantasy adventure set in mythical Japan, already generating Oscar buzz.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spring 2026 Anime Soundtrack Album Breaks Streaming Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: Compilation album featuring music from top Spring 2026 anime series achieves record-breaking streams in first week, highlighting growing importance of anime music.

anime_pulse_items.title: New Isekai Manga 'Dungeon Accountant' Goes Viral
anime_pulse_items.summary: Unique isekai premise featuring an accountant reincarnated in a fantasy world gains viral attention for its humorous take on RPG economics.

anime_pulse_items.title: Anime Convention Attendance Surges Post-Pandemic
anime_pulse_items.summary: Major anime conventions report highest attendance numbers since 2019, with Spring 2026 events featuring exclusive premieres and creator panels.

anime_pulse_items.title: Retro Anime Remaster Project Announced for Classic 90s Series
anime_pulse_items.summary: Major streaming service announces 4K remaster of beloved 1990s anime series, complete with new bonus content and director's commentary.

anime_pulse_items.title: Anime-Inspired Fashion Collaboration Launches Worldwide
anime_pulse_items.summary: High-end fashion brand partners with popular Spring 2026 anime for limited clothing collection, selling out within hours globally.
